3209410.name: OMSI 2 Add-on IVECO Bus Family Urbanway Natural Power
3209410.description:
Experience the Future of Urban Transport with the Add-on IVECO Bus Family Urbanway Natural Power! Dive into innovation by taking the wheel of the IVECO Urbanway Step E buses, now powered by natural gas (CNG).

This unique DLC offers you a realistic and detailed driving experience with vehicles available in solo 2 and 3-door versions, as well as articulated 3 and 4-door versions.

Features:

  • Complete newly refined 3D models: The buses feature enhanced 3D models, with advanced reflection management on the body and windows for increased realism.

  • Comprehensive customisation options: Customize your bus with a wide range of options, such as door operation, interior/exterior self-service activation, classic or camera-based rearview mirrors, air conditioning, and much more.

  • Special configurations: Enable or disable features like the Mild-Hybrid mode, door opening/closing alarms, automatic parking brake, and adjust the license plate to reflect bus numbering.

  • State-of-the-Art equipment: All vehicles are equipped with NAVINEO and Yard Solutions Ticketmachine. The matrix displays are compatible with the St-Servan map and other classic maps.

  • Improved driving physics: Enjoy a realistic driving experience with overhauled physics to match real-life performance, with meticulously studied gear shifting whether you choose the VOITH gearbox or the VOITH NXT for the Mild-Hybrid version.

  • Extended compatibility: The CNG Urbanway seamlessly integrates with both specific and classic matrix displays, making your OMSI 2 experience even more immersive.

Get ready to redefine urban transport and offer an unparalleled experience to your passengers with the Add-on IVECO Bus Family Urbanway Natural Power. Drive the future of innovation versions.
3209410.supported_languages:
英语, 德语*, 法语
*具有完全音频支持的语言
